markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Pamela to the Diligent content production process.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Process Workaround:** The broken `Agentic Refresher` pipeline requires a manual workaround: generate a net-new draft and "stitch" it with the old article to preserve context.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**High-Stakes Content:** Diligent's content is for enterprise decision-makers, demanding extreme accuracy. The post-processing editorial checklist is critical for catching errors.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [**Complex Workflow:** The submission process is multi-step, using Airtable for internal tracking and the client's Optimizely CMS for submission, which triggers a multi-team review.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [**Key Deadlines:** Articles are due in Optimizely by Thursday EOD to allow for the client's review cycle. The Looker dashboard must be updated every Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)

## Topics

### Diligent Content Production Process

  - [**Pipeline Workaround:** The `Agentic Refresher` pipeline is broken.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
      - [**Solution:** Generate a net-new draft and manually combine it with the old article to preserve context.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**Net-New Pipeline (`Articles Agent`):**](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Research → Draft → Enforce statistical constraints → Internal linking → Source linking → Validate guidelines → Add metadata, expert quotes, & Diligent proofpoints.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [**Known Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
          - [Internal linking is inconsistent and often requires manual fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
          - [Mid-text CTAs frequently have broken links that must be replaced.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Post-Processing & QA:**](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [Export the Atlas draft to Claude.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [Use the project's editorial checklist to flag issues and get fix recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [Apply editorial judgment to finalize the article.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Images:**](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
      - [**Source:** `brand.diligent.com`](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Minimum of one product image per article, with alt text.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Cover Image:** Handled by Sulaiman during publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Airtable & Workflow Management

  - [**`Approved to Start`:** Add new articles here, mapping them to the correct topic cluster, product, and business unit.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [**`In Production`:** Move articles here when work begins.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [**`Reviewing Diligence`:** Move articles here when ready for client submission.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [**Topic Selection:** Select topics from the `Approved to Start` column based on client priorities (e.g., LLM gap refreshes).](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)

### Submission & Publishing Process

  - [**Submission to Optimizely (Client CMS):**](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
      - [Use the team account to upload the finalized article.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
      - [**Status Flow:** `Created` → `Content Review` → `SEO Review` → `Revisions Done` → `Publishing` → `Publish Blog Completed`.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [**Publishing Request to Sulaiman:**](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
      - [Submit a Linear ticket with links to the final document and the live article (for refreshes).](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
      - [**Thursday EOD:** Submit articles to Optimizely.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
      - [**Following Monday/Tuesday:** Client review and feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
      - [**Following Tuesday:** Submit revised articles to Sulaiman for publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
      - [**Result:** A \~1-week lag between submission and publication.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)

### Looker Dashboard Updates

  - [**Cadence:** Every Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Provides accurate performance data for the client's weekly meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
  - [**Tool:** Use the Claude B Pod project to convert URLs to the required format for Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)
  - [**Threshold:** Flag Ademilade or Carrie when a dashboard reaches 200 URLs, as this requires a special process.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Pamela:**](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)
      - [Submit at least one Diligent article for review by Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=2105.0)
      - [Update Looker dashboards for Descern and Yerko for any missed weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
      - [Take ownership of the weekly Diligent Looker update starting next week.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1999.0)
  - [**Ademilade:**](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)
      - [Record Loom videos for:](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=2067.0)
          - [The Optimizely submission process.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
          - [The Looker dashboard update process.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
      - [Add the updated editorial checklist to the Claude project.](https://fathom.video/share/7HrJATyQLB9sKQ52yzDhVzafbuEUqVEg?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
